name: opencode
title: Opencode Desktop
description: Search Opencode projects, worktrees, sessions, and docs from Raycast.
author: anduimagui

preferences.name: cloneDirectory
preferences.title: Clone Directory
preferences.description: Default folder used by the Clone Project command for new repositories.

commands.name: search-projects
commands.title: Search Projects
commands.subtitle: Opencode
commands.description: Search Opencode projects from the local CLI and open them in Opencode.

commands.name: clone-project
commands.title: Clone Project
commands.subtitle: Opencode
commands.description: Clone a Git repository into your configured folder and open it in Opencode.

commands.name: sync
commands.title: Sync Cache
commands.subtitle: Opencode
commands.description: Refresh the cached Opencode project list and icons.

commands.name: open-last-unread-session
commands.title: Open Unread Sessions
commands.subtitle: Opencode
commands.description: Show Opencode sessions that need attention, using the same dot states as the sidebar.

commands.name: worktrees
commands.title: Search Worktrees
commands.subtitle: Opencode
commands.description: Search Opencode worktrees and open them in Opencode.

commands.name: search-documentation
commands.title: Search Documentation
commands.subtitle: Opencode
commands.description: Browse Opencode documentation and open any page in your browser.

preferences.name: docsLocale
preferences.title: Documentation Locale
preferences.description: Only show documentation pages for the selected language.
